title: the past ages (REWORK)
description: this mod will bring prehistoric creatures and such to ur world
body:
this mod will bring prehistoric creatures to ur game, weapons, meats, blocks and plants in the future (this one is an alpha)
this alpha brings:
creatures:

maip
denonychus
suchomimus
kentrosaurs
ampelosaurus

items:

maip claw
kentrosaurus spike

weapons:

kentro bat
hunters blade
